_meta.name: Code Language Detection — Multi-language Corpus
_meta.purpose: Code snippets in languages beyond the original heuristic's 5 (Python/JS/Java/C++/SQL). Tests whether Pygments + signature patterns expand coverage.

queries.query: interface User { id: number; name: string; } const x: User = {id: 1, name: 'a'};
fn main() { let mut x = 1; impl Foo for Bar {} match x { _ => {} } }
func main() { package main; defer cleanup(); fmt.Println("hi") }
public class Foo { private int x; public static void main(String[] args) { System.out.println("hi"); } }
SELECT id, name FROM users WHERE active = 1 GROUP BY id ORDER BY created_at DESC

WORKDIR /app
